channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: House fire kills 10 in Peru's capital, including five minors reut.rs/3ROOsDG

item.title: Food, fury and supporters near and far keep India protest al…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Food, fury and supporters near and far keep India protest alive reut.rs/4pSIrCN

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム アニメ『名探偵プリキュア！』ED 、可愛さと遊び心あふれるプリキュアたちの表現に注目！〜No.1／…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
アニメ『名探偵プリキュア！』ED 、可愛さと遊び心あふれるプリキュアたちの表現に注目！〜No.1／演出篇

2026年2月から放送が開始されたアニメ『名探偵プリキュア！』。エンディング（以下、ED）曲は「なぜ？謎？！ANSWER」で、本映像にはキュアアンサー、キュアミスティック、キュアアルカナ・シャドウの3人が登場。キャッチーな楽曲と覚えやすいダンスが人気を博し、さらに高品質な3Dアニメーションも高く評価されている。...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
アニメ『名探偵プリキュア！』ED 、可愛さと遊び心あふれるプリキュアたちの表現に注目！〜No.1／演出篇

2026年2月から放送が開始されたアニメ『名探偵プリキュア！』。エンディング（以下、ED）曲は「なぜ？謎？！ANSWER」で、本映像にはキュアアンサー、キュアミスティック、キュアアルカナ・シャドウの3人が登場。キャッチーな楽曲と覚えやすいダンスが人気を博し、さらに高品質な3Dアニメーションも高く評価されている。...

item.title: Bertha is kicking up tropical storm-force winds and dangerou…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Bertha is kicking up tropical storm-force winds and dangerous beach conditions as tracks along the northern Gulf Coast, but its moisture will also help fuel a more serious flooding rain threat hundreds of miles away on the East Coast through the end of the week. https://cnn.it/4vNQLF8
item.content:encoded: Bertha is kicking up tropical storm-force winds and dangerous beach conditions as tracks along the northern Gulf Coast, but its moisture will also help fuel a more serious flooding rain threat hundreds of miles away on the East Coast through the end of the week. https://cnn.it/4vNQLF8

item.title: 100 National Guard members have been deployed to West Virgin…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: 100 National Guard members have been deployed to West Virginia flash floods inundate homes and businesses.
item.content:encoded: 100 National Guard members have been deployed to West Virginia flash floods inundate homes and businesses.

item.title: A judge’s move to pause Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion ta…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: A judge’s move to pause Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. has prompted traders to price in greater odds of deal disruptions and lengthy legal delays for a transaction already fraught with risks
item.content:encoded: A judge’s move to pause Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. has prompted traders to price in greater odds of deal disruptions and lengthy legal delays for a transaction already fraught with risks

item.author: Fox News - Breaking News Updates | Latest News Headlines | Phot… (@foxnews.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: Reuters identified 129 people charged under the federal 'vot…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Reuters identified 129 people charged under the federal 'voting by aliens' statute since 1996. More than two-thirds of those prosecutions have been filed during Trump's two terms in office. One of the people swept up in the crackdown is Dora Damatta‑Rodriguez reut.rs/4gSsUAf
item.content:encoded: Reuters identified 129 people charged under the federal 'voting by aliens' statute since 1996. More than two-thirds of those prosecutions have been filed during Trump's two terms in office. One of the people swept up in the crackdown is Dora Damatta‑Rodriguez reut.rs/4gSsUAf

item.title: Laura Doyle, author of “The Surrendered Wife" and several ot…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Laura Doyle, author of “The Surrendered Wife" and several other books, believes women can be too controlling. Many women — of all types — credit her with saving their marriages.
item.content:encoded: Laura Doyle, author of “The Surrendered Wife" and several other books, believes women can be too controlling. Many women — of all types — credit her with saving their marriages.

item.title: "This policy could cause generic drug shortages or aggravate…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: "This policy could cause generic drug shortages or aggravate existing shortages," policy expert Rena Conti told Newsweek.
item.content:encoded: "This policy could cause generic drug shortages or aggravate existing shortages," policy expert Rena Conti told Newsweek.

item.title: The author Salman Rushdie is expected to testify against Had…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The author Salman Rushdie is expected to testify against Hadi Matar, the man who repeatedly stabbed him in 2022, who faces terrorism charges. Matar’s lawyers argue that he acted on his own, not on behalf of Iran.
item.content:encoded: The author Salman Rushdie is expected to testify against Hadi Matar, the man who repeatedly stabbed him in 2022, who faces terrorism charges. Matar’s lawyers argue that he acted on his own, not on behalf of Iran.

item.title: JUST IN: The US Senate Commerce Committee approved legislati…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: JUST IN: The US Senate Commerce Committee approved legislation to toughen a US government ban on Chinese automakers entering the American market that could potentially bar Mercedes-Benz from selling vehicles in the United States reut.rs/4pyUO6s
item.content:encoded: JUST IN: The US Senate Commerce Committee approved legislation to toughen a US government ban on Chinese automakers entering the American market that could potentially bar Mercedes-Benz from selling vehicles in the United States reut.rs/4pyUO6s

item.title: France becomes the first European country to pass a law bann…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
France becomes the first European country to pass a law banning social media access for users under 15, which could go into effect as soon as September 1 (Mark Landler/New York Times)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
France becomes the first European country to pass a law banning social media access for users under 15, which could go into effect as soon as September 1 (Mark Landler/New York Times)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: Andy Burnham barely had time to settle into his chair in No.…

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム やめろ好きになってしまう第59話 松浦邸大爆破 その③｜ヤンジャン＋集英社公式・ジャンプ系青年マン…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
やめろ好きになってしまう第59話 松浦邸大爆破　その③｜ヤンジャン＋集英社公式・ジャンプ系青年マンガ誌アプリ

故意か無邪気か!?　脳内騒然ラブコメディ!!　上っ面を取り繕い生きてきた冷静な男子高校生・松浦吾妻。他人の本性を容易に見透かす彼だが、ある日突然陽キャのツインテ美少女・厳木紗代（きゅうらぎさよ）にアプローチされて―!?　故意か無邪気か、あざとい彼女の一挙手一投足に松浦は…― 「やめろ！　好きになってしまう!...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
やめろ好きになってしまう第59話 松浦邸大爆破　その③｜ヤンジャン＋集英社公式・ジャンプ系青年マンガ誌アプリ

故意か無邪気か!?　脳内騒然ラブコメディ!!　上っ面を取り繕い生きてきた冷静な男子高校生・松浦吾妻。他人の本性を容易に見透かす彼だが、ある日突然陽キャのツインテ美少女・厳木紗代（きゅうらぎさよ）にアプローチされて―!?　故意か無邪気か、あざとい彼女の一挙手一投足に松浦は…― 「やめろ！　好きになってしまう!...

item.title: The cause of death for Nolan Wells, an 18-year-old whose bod…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The cause of death for Nolan Wells, an 18-year-old whose body was found July 6 along the shoreline of Horn Island off the Mississippi coast, has not been determined, according to preliminary independent autopsy results announced Wednesday. https://cnn.it/44ERjSH
item.content:encoded: The cause of death for Nolan Wells, an 18-year-old whose body was found July 6 along the shoreline of Horn Island off the Mississippi coast, has not been determined, according to preliminary independent autopsy results announced Wednesday. https://cnn.it/44ERjSH

item.title: Eighteen Americans were isolated for weeks in a Nebraska qua…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Eighteen Americans were isolated for weeks in a Nebraska quarantine facility after being exposed to a deadly hantavirus on a cruise ship. Many found the experience traumatic. nyti.ms/4pSBbqx
item.content:encoded: Eighteen Americans were isolated for weeks in a Nebraska quarantine facility after being exposed to a deadly hantavirus on a cruise ship. Many found the experience traumatic. nyti.ms/4pSBbqx

item.title: #🔖世の中 東京都、猛暑で男性のハーフパンツ勤務を推奨 女性からは「スネハラ」との声も - BBCニュース 日本では…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
東京都、猛暑で男性のハーフパンツ勤務を推奨　女性からは「スネハラ」との声も - BBCニュース

日本では今夏の気温の上昇に伴い、男性がこれまで以上に仕事中に脚を露出するようになっている。東京都はオフィス勤務の男性に対し、普段のスーツとネクタイを脱ぎ捨て、Tシャツやスニーカー、そしてハーフパンツといったよりカジュアルな服装で勤務するよう推奨している。 小池百合子都知事は4月に「東京クールビズ」を...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
東京都、猛暑で男性のハーフパンツ勤務を推奨　女性からは「スネハラ」との声も - BBCニュース

日本では今夏の気温の上昇に伴い、男性がこれまで以上に仕事中に脚を露出するようになっている。東京都はオフィス勤務の男性に対し、普段のスーツとネクタイを脱ぎ捨て、Tシャツやスニーカー、そしてハーフパンツといったよりカジュアルな服装で勤務するよう推奨している。 小池百合子都知事は4月に「東京クールビズ」を...
